headline: Dell’s Pangea 5 Win Highlights AI And Energy Computing Ambitions
summary: Dell Technologies and Nvidia have been chosen by TotalEnergies to design and install Pangea 5, a new high performance supercomputer for seismic imaging and AI research in energy. The project expands Dell's role in high performance computing infrastructure, targeting both AI driven research and energy efficiency for a major global energy company. Pangea 5 positions Dell as a key supplier to demanding, regulated industries that require large scale, energy conscious computing power. For...
